{{Quote|This is a Sith holocron. It was created centuries ago by a powerful dark lord called Darth Nihilus.|Nariel Pridence|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
[[File:Ni_cron.jpg|thumb|left|100px|[[Darth Nihilus|Darth Nihilus's]], gatekeeper projected from his [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith holocron/Legends|holocron]].]]
'''Darth Nihilus' holocron''' was a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] made by [[Darth Nihilus]].

During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Vaverone Zare]] attempted to lay claim to this artifact at the [[Lightspring]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] whilst the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Nariel Pridence]] attempted to prevent her from retrieving the relic.

By [[137 ABY]], the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] had fallen into the hands of [[Darth Krayt]], who used it to contact the gatekeeper in the image of the late [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].
